data.content:
Everything works. Here's what was built:

**Project structure:**
```
TicketClassifier/
├── Models/
│   ├── TicketData.cs          # ML.NET data model + prediction output
│   └── TicketRequest.cs       # API DTOs (request, response, metrics)
├── Services/
│   └── TicketClassifierService.cs  # Training pipeline, evaluation, prediction
├── Controllers/
│   └── TicketsController.cs   # REST endpoints
├── Data/tickets.csv           # 36-row training dataset
└── Program.cs                 # DI wiring
```

**ML pipeline:** Text featurization (Subject + Description) → concatenated with Priority → MinMax normalization → SDCA Maximum Entropy multiclass classifier.

**Endpoints:**
- `POST /api/tickets/classify` — accepts `{subject, description, priority}`, returns predicted category + per-class confidence scores
- `GET /api/tickets/metrics` — returns macro/micro accuracy, log-loss, and per-category precision/recall/F1

The model trains on startup from the CSV and evaluates against a 20% test split.
